ops.title: Re-record astgrep testdata fixtures whose content embeds deleted tilth.go source
ops.description: internal/astgrep/testdata/{outline,rewrite,search}_stream.jsonl are recorded ast-grep transcripts captured over the old internal/backend/tilth.go. Inert (parse fixtures), but they reference a deleted file. Re-record over a current file and re-cut the paired expected values. Deferred from the v0.25.0 teardown to avoid golden churn in the release.

ops.text: outline_stream/rewrite_stream/search_stream.jsonl re-recorded over living files with paired assertions re-cut; grep -ri tilth internal/ returns nothing
